# Pull Request Description

> **§390 — Every pull request should include summary, motivation, testing, and impact.**

---

## Summary

<!-- What changed? One paragraph max. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why was this change needed? Link to issue if applicable. -->

## Testing

<!-- What validation was performed? Include commands/output if relevant. -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Impact

<!-- What areas are affected? Any migration needed? -->

- **Affected files:** <!-- list key files changed -->
- **Breaking changes:** <!-- yes / no -->
- **Migration guide:** <!-- if breaking, describe migration steps -->

## Follow-up

<!-- Any future work this enables or requires. Optional. -->

---

> **Remember:** Large unrelated changes should be split into multiple reviewable pull requests.
